questions.question: Когда выбирать Pattern API/MATCH_RECOGNIZE, а когда — custom KeyedProcessFunction?

options.text: Pattern API: simple temporal sequences, single-key isolation, known structure, bounded window. KeyedProcessFunction: cross-key correlation, dynamic patterns from config, external lookups (async I/O), custom emit logic, ultra-low latency
По языку: Java → Pattern API, Python → KeyedProcessFunction

questions.explanation: Decision matrix: Pattern API covers 70% production cases — declarative, NFA-optimised, watermark-driven correctness. KeyedProcessFunction covers 30% — когда нужны structural capabilities Pattern API не даёт: (1) multi-source correlation (Pattern API per-key only); (2) dynamic patterns runtime through Broadcast state; (3) external lookups через Async I/O (IterativeCondition не имеет async API); (4) custom state shape (not bound to NFA structure); (5) low-latency emit без watermark progression. Best architectures combine: enrichment (state machine) → CEP → correlator (state machine).

questions.question: Для detection 'account takeover sequence' где первое условие — LOGIN_SUCCESS из нового IP (нового для user). Как реализовать?

options.text: Hybrid: upstream KeyedProcessFunction для enrichment (хранит ValueState<Set<String>> historical IPs, добавляет isNewIP field), потом CEP на enriched events. IterativeCondition не имеет access к historical state outside текущего partial match
MATCH_RECOGNIZE с CROSS JOIN на historical IPs table

questions.explanation: Structural limit IterativeCondition: даёт access ТОЛЬКО к events в текущем partial match через ctx.getEventsForPattern(name). Historical user state (set of seen IPs) — это external knowledge, Pattern API не имеет direct access. Production solution: upstream enrichment через KeyedProcessFunction со ValueState<Set<String>> historical IPs. Adds isNewIP=true/false field to event. CEP downstream видит уже enriched events — простой where(e -> e.isNewIP()). Это standard production pattern для context-dependent CEP.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Case 2: suspicious operation sequence

questions.question: Detection coordinated fraud где user A и user B (разные users) делают transactions same merchant within 5 min из разных locations. Какой подход?

options.text: KeyedProcessFunction со state machine, keyBy(merchant) — это cross-key correlation которая не expressible в Pattern API (он runs per-key). State машина хранит recent transactions per merchant и проверяет cross-user condition
Two parallel Pattern API jobs с union

questions.explanation: Pattern API isolates per-key — нельзя нативно correlate events across users в одном partial match. Workaround keyBy(merchant) теряет per-user isolation, но это правильно для этого case: per-merchant state список recent transactions, в processElement проверяем cross-user condition (different userId + different location + within 5 min). Это state machine territory — custom state shape (List<TxRecord>), explicit TTL cleanup, custom emit logic. Pattern API не подходит structurally.

questions.question: Если в use case нужны dynamic patterns (бизнес update rules через UI runtime), Pattern API подходит — патtern перекомпилируется на каждое event.
questions.explanation: False. Pattern API компилирует pattern в NFA at job submission time — NFA structure fixed на весь lifecycle job-а. Изменение pattern требует savepoint stop + start с новым кодом, и savepoint state структурально несовместим с new NFA. Для dynamic rules use KeyedProcessFunction со state machine + Broadcast state: rules update через broadcast stream (Kafka rules topic), broadcast state replicated на все subtasks, state machine reads current rules per event и применяет dynamic logic. Это standard pattern в production rule engines (Stripe Radar, Uber DSS).
